resources.string: Decreasing threshold of pose detect results button
Increasing threshold of pose detect results button
Click + to add an image or a video to begin running the pose landmarker.
Improve your technique with\nartificial intelligence and instant feedback

AI Coach for Table Tennis

Version: 1.0.0 MVP

Uses MediaPipe for technique analysis
and providing instant feedback.

© 2025 TT Coach AI
Are you sure you want to exit?
Select an exercise to start training
This exercise will be available in future versions.
Basic forehand stroke with body rotation
Forehand modeled on Andrii\'s captured stroke
Develop topspin control on backhand shots
Keep the ball in play for as long as possible
📍 Stand in starting position for forehand drive
Are you sure you want to finish the current training?
Are you sure you want to discard this session? It will not be saved.
Are you sure you want to reset all settings to default values?
Contact too high - lower strike point
Contact too low - raise strike point
Elbow far from body - keep it closer
Elbow pressed to body - keep it looser
Contact at table level - optimal height
Don\'t press your elbow too tightly
Failed to detect pose - check lighting and camera position
🎯 Don\'t give up! Every practice makes you better!
💡 Tip: Imagine holding a pencil - wrist should be an extension of forearm
💡 Tip: Turn waist and shoulders as one - imagine winding a spring
💡 Tip: Optimal contact point - waist height, slightly ahead of body
💡 Tip: Imagine brushing the ball up and forward - don\'t stop at contact
Select an exercise to start training
🔥 5 good strokes in a row! Keep going!
💡 Tip: Imagine holding a pencil - wrist should be an extension of forearm
💡 Tip: Turn waist and shoulders as one - imagine winding a spring
💡 Tip: Optimal contact point - waist height, slightly ahead of body
💡 Tip: Complete stroke - racket should finish near opposite shoulder
Adjust the volume of voice feedback and sound effects
Higher quality improves pose detection accuracy
Higher frame rates capture faster movements
For best results, use 720p at 30 FPS with pose skeleton enabled. This balance provides accurate feedback without draining your battery.
Increase text size for better visibility when training farther from the camera
Choose a coaching style that matches your learning preference
High-energy coaching with lots of encouragement and positive reinforcement
Detail-oriented coaching focused on perfect form. Ideal for players who want to master technical precision.
Gentle encouragement with concise feedback. Perfect for beginners who prefer a supportive approach.
Show debug activity in navigation for testing
A new \"Debug\" tab will appear in the bottom navigation. Use it to test features and view diagnostic information.
Your premium subscription is active until %s.
You\'re on the free plan. Upgrade to unlock all features.
• When subscription is active: Full access to training and drills
• When subscription is inactive: Starting training or drills will redirect to subscription page
• This setting affects the subscription status shown in your Profile
Enjoy unlimited AI coaching and all premium features
Unlock unlimited AI coaching, advanced pose analysis, and personalized training plans
Choose your preferred language for the app
Are you sure you want to log out?
Get unlimited access to AI coaching and advanced training tools
Start with a realistic target and gradually increase it as you improve. Consistency is more important than perfection!
Position your camera to see your full body. Keep moving for active training!
Highlighted areas show the movement pattern
You made contact with the ball at the optimal point in front of your body.
%d more sessions to reach your weekly goal
No video files found in assets/Videos
How often to run ball detection. Higher = more precise tracking, more battery usage

Place the phone 2–3 m to your side, waist-height, at your hitting angle. You should be fully visible in frame during the stroke.\n\nYou\'ll perform %1$d reference reps of the forehand shadow swing in your natural technique — no coaching, just your normal stroke.
You\'ve captured %1$d reps — at least %2$d are required to save a baseline. Exit anyway?
Not enough valid reps to derive a baseline. Try again with steadier strokes.
Complete more sessions to see your most-flagged corrections.

1. Place the camera to the side, at waist height, 2–3 m away.\n2. Perform 8–10 strokes at your natural pace.\n3. The app will remember your angles as the baseline — this is your own technique, not a "correct" form.
\"%1$s\" will be removed. This cannot be undone.
Tune how your coach watches and talks to you
Pick a coaching style that fits how you like to train
Language of the app\'s screens and menus
Language your coach speaks and writes in
Cues, cadence & praise · applies to all sessions
Use 720p at 30 FPS with the pose skeleton on. This balance keeps feedback accurate without draining your battery.
Global — layered on top of exercise strictness
Advanced — how strokes are picked out
Redefine ideal ranges per phase. Empty = standard values.
No detailed analytics for this session
No sessions yet — start a drill
